since_last: 55% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.69%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.11% · Gold +0.12% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 55% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.69%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.69%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +9.26%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.26%, OKLO +5.12%, OKLO +5.12%, NOW +5.11%, CRM +3.89%. Laggards: MU -2.49%, CEVA -2.23%, MRVL -2.03%, LRCX -1.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.04% at $174.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.04% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
